title: TANUVAS Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Various Technical Fellow Posts
description: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for Technical Fellow Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for M.V.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the T ANUVAS Recruitment 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
